indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space allows for a wide range of movement and stretching exercises.

indicators.name: Natural light
indicators.rationale: Natural light can help set a calming atmosphere conducive to yoga and stretching.

indicators.name: View of nature
indicators.rationale: The view of nature can provide a sense of peace and connection to the outdoors, enhancing the yoga experience.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is ideally suited for yoga and stretching due to its large open space, natural light, and connection to nature.
